name: falah-obsidian
description: Islamic writing features for Obsidian's native Markdown editor

scripts.build:core: esbuild assets/bundled-core/build.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:obsidian --outfile=assets/bundled-core/.build.cjs && node assets/bundled-core/.build.cjs && rm assets/bundled-core/.build.cjs
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
